eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: La Plata, CO; at 07:40 AM ON MAR 23, 2026 Effective until 07:55 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a Test of La Plata County Emergency Management's alert system. Residents of La Plata County should sign-up for L P C Alerts on the County's website at w w w . l p c g o v . o r g.
